'''''Intrepid''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], ''Intrepid'' was escorting a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] supply convoy en route to [[Liinade III]] when the fleet was pulled from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] into [[M2934738 system/Legends|M2934738]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]] ''[[Binder]]''. In the subsequent battle, ''Intrepid'' damaged ''Binder'' heavily but was destroyed by [[Reckoning (Imperial II-class)|''Reckoning'']]{{'s}} barrages. The [[Frigate/Legends|frigate's]] hull split in two, disgorging its crew as the hulk drifted in space.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
